heading: Charges and specifications

children.text: that the signer has personal knowledge of, or reason to believe, the matters set forth therein; and
that such matters are true in fact to the best of the signer’s knowledge and belief.

children.heading: .—Notice to Accused
children.label: b .—Notice to Accused
children.text: Upon the swearing of the charges and specifications in accordance with subsection (a), the accused shall be informed of the charges and specifications against the accused as soon as practicable.
